meta.purpose: Canonical audit and handoff registry for the current DanBeem tool surface, including all local HTML pages and the external context URLs used to build or explain the NORS crosswalk, drafting assistant, and responsible-use workflow.
notes: Use this file as the single source of truth when sharing the current framework with another AI system or developer.
All local HTML pages in the repository are listed here, even when they are not part of the primary NORS workflow.
External authority/context documents are not stored as local HTML files; they are captured here so the handoff can remain complete.

html_pages.title: DanBeem Ombudsman Tools and Resource Lab (Test Environment)
html_pages.role: Primary landing page for the current tool surface, including a Connecticut nursing home staffing transparency suite overview.
html_pages.notes: This is the main entry point. It includes a concise guide to the five Connecticut nursing home staffing transparency tools and does not perform live AI calls.

html_pages.title: Drafting & Reference Assistant
html_pages.role: Case-notes checklist and drafting workflow with inline NORS topic/reference support.
data_dependencies: Assets/crosswalk.js shared data loader and all crosswalk-linked JSON data
html_pages.notes: Current drafting MVP. Closed-loop, local-data driven, no live model calls.

html_pages.title: NORS Crosswalk Tool
html_pages.role: Primary NORS code and keyword-to-authority crosswalk.
data_dependencies: Assets/crosswalk.js shared data loader and all crosswalk-linked JSON data
html_pages.notes: Current crosswalk MVP. Closed-loop, local-data driven, no live model calls.

html_pages.title: Connecticut Nursing Home Staffing Explorer
html_pages.role: Public-facing Connecticut facility-level PBJ staffing explorer with screening-level interpretation, facility trend context, selected-facility reporting, and ombudsman follow-up questions.
html_pages.notes: Phase 4H facility-level view using the static Connecticut staffing export. Includes PBJ-derived Connecticut direct-care staffing comparison estimates that exclude nursing administration/DON-style hours and do not determine compliance, harm, or violations. Supports facility deep links with ?ccn=, links to affiliation staffing summaries when CMS SNF Enrollment affiliation fields are present, and provides selected-facility print summaries plus five-quarter facility trend CSV exports.

html_pages.title: Connecticut Nursing Home Statewide Staffing Comparison
html_pages.role: Public-facing latest-quarter statewide Connecticut nursing home staffing comparison with search, filters, sorting, filtered-view summary analytics, print reporting, facility drill-down links, filtered CSV export, and copyable briefing summaries.
html_pages.notes: Phase 7C static latest-quarter facility comparison view. Uses the generated Connecticut staffing export to show one row per facility with latest-quarter PBJ data, CT direct-care screening estimates, case-mix context, affiliation context, filtered-view summary analytics, print-friendly current-view reporting, copyable current-view briefing summaries, facility drill-down links, and filtered CSV export. Does not make legal, compliance, harm, neglect, or care-quality findings.

html_pages.title: Connecticut Nursing Home Staffing Change Over Time
html_pages.role: Public-facing earliest-to-latest Connecticut nursing home staffing change explorer with ranking modes, search, filters, printable current change views, copyable briefing summaries, facility trend drill-down links, and current change table CSV export.
html_pages.notes: Phase 7C static change-over-time view. Computes earliest-to-latest facility staffing changes in front-end JavaScript from the generated Connecticut staffing export, excluding facilities missing either endpoint quarter from primary change ranking tables. Includes CT direct-care HPRD estimate decline/improvement modes, CT 3.00 direct-care comparison point crossing modes, contract staff percentage increase mode, RN HPRD decrease mode, printable current-view reporting, copyable current-view briefing summaries, facility trend drill-down links, and filtered CSV export. Does not make legal, compliance, harm, neglect, causation, or care-quality findings.

html_pages.title: Connecticut Nursing Home Persistent Staffing Patterns
html_pages.role: Public-facing multi-quarter Connecticut nursing home staffing screening explorer with persistence modes, threshold control, quarter-by-quarter pattern strips, query-filter support, search, filters, print reporting, copyable briefing summaries, facility trend drill-down links, and current table CSV export.
html_pages.notes: Phase 7C static persistent-patterns view. Computes repeated staffing screening patterns across available PBJ quarters in front-end JavaScript from the generated Connecticut staffing export. Includes CT 3.00 direct-care comparison point, CT 0.84 licensed comparison point, CMS case-mix comparison point, contract staff 10%+, and contract staff 20%+ persistence modes with minimum-quarter thresholds, quarter-by-quarter visual pattern strips, query parameters for mode/threshold/affiliation, live current-view summaries, print-friendly current-view reporting, copyable current-view briefing summaries, facility trend drill-down links, and filtered CSV export. Missing PBJ rows and missing case-mix benchmark values are not counted as adverse findings. Does not make legal, compliance, harm, neglect, causation, or care-quality findings.

html_pages.title: Connecticut Nursing Home Ownership & Staffing Explorer
html_pages.role: Public-facing affiliation-level staffing explorer with statewide affiliation comparison tables, persistent-pattern summaries, CSV export, print reporting, and copyable briefing summaries grouped by CMS SNF Enrollment affiliation entity using the generated Connecticut staffing export.
html_pages.notes: Phase 6E static derived view. Calculates statewide affiliation comparison tables, selected affiliation-group staffing summaries, persistent multi-quarter affiliation screening pattern summaries with current-view CSV export, focused print reporting, copyable briefing summaries, Connecticut direct-care comparison summaries, and selected-affiliation print/CSV reporting actions in front-end JavaScript from the normalized Connecticut export. Supports ?affiliation= deep links, preferring CMS SNF Enrollment affiliation entity IDs and falling back to names, plus cross-links to the Persistent Staffing Patterns tool filtered by mode, threshold, and affiliation. Uses simple facility averages and does not make chain quality, legal, harm, neglect, or compliance findings.

html_pages.title: About the Nursing Home Staffing Data
html_pages.role: Public-facing methodology page for the Connecticut Nursing Home Staffing Transparency Tools, explaining source datasets, HPRD formulas, PBJ row inclusion rules, CT direct-care comparison estimates, case-mix comparison points, affiliation context, source references, limitations, and audit validation.
html_pages.notes: Phase 7E public explanation page. It documents that the staffing suite is designed for screening, comparison, and question-building, not formal compliance findings or stand-alone care-quality conclusions. Includes public links to CMS PBJ Daily Nurse Staffing, CMS Provider Information, CMS Nursing Home Data Dictionary, CMS SNF Enrollments, Connecticut Title 19 Sec. 19-13-D8t, and Connecticut DPH's amended 3.0 staffing implementation notice.

html_pages.title: Responsible Use & Sources
html_pages.role: Transparency page for source registry, source pack, workflow guardrails, glossary, and human review flags.
html_pages.notes: Primary transparency/audit page for the current NORS workflow.
